name: 10" Ceramic Plant Stand Ivory - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your garden with this Ceramic Plant Stand from Threshold™. This plant stand is made of ceramic and is designed in an ivory hue to add a touch of sophistication to your garden. Designed in a round shape, this outdoor plant stand can house a variety of plants, making it perfect for patios and backyards.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
